title: Vectara Document
description: A Vectara document is either a structured (Core) document with explicit parts, or an unstructured file that Vectara parses into parts.

id.description: Caller-assigned unique identifier within the corpus.

type.description: Whether the document was added via Core indexing or file upload.

metadata.description: Document-level metadata used for filtering and presentation.

document_parts.description: Ordered list of document parts (sections, chunks) indexed for retrieval.
